TrafficSchoolPicker.com is an independent comparison site that helps drivers find court-approved online traffic school. We review and rank schools by price, speed, and quality across all 50 US states.

Our mission is to help drivers who have received traffic tickets find the best online traffic school for their state at the lowest price. We compare court-approved schools on price, completion time, user ratings, course quality, and features.

Key pages:
- Homepage: Compare top-rated online traffic schools
- State pages: Find traffic schools approved in your specific state (all 50 states covered)
- School reviews: In-depth reviews of individual traffic schools
- Blog: Guides on ticket dismissal, traffic school tips, and cost comparisons

We independently research and review every school we list. Our rankings are based on editorial evaluation, not paid placement.
